name: pi-essentials
description: Personal pack of Pi coding-agent extensions. First-party-quality tools that keep context clean. Ships a context-safe fetch tool and a doc_to_md PDF/DOCX/PPTX-to-Markdown converter.

scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc --noEmit --allowImportingTsExtensions --target es2022 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --strict --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --lib es2022 --types node fetch.ts fetch.test.ts doc_to_md.ts doc_to_md.test.ts types/turndown-plugin-gfm.d.ts
